wiz_api_key_msg:
To use the automatic AI setup you need
a Groq API Key (100% free):

  1. Go to console.groq.com
  2. Sign in → API Keys → Create key
  3. In settings → Bot tab → AI Settings
     paste your key and click Save

After saving, the wizard will open automatically
to read your resume and configure the bot.
wiz_msg:
Welcome to CVSniper!

I can read your resume (PDF) and configure
the bot automatically:

  • Your name, city, phone
  • Job search terms based on your profile
  • Information to answer application forms
  • Your saved resume path

If you do not have your resume handy, you can configure manually.
wiz_detail_ai: Consulting AI to extract your data...
wiz_err_pdf_msg:
Could not extract text from the PDF.

Make sure the PDF is not a scanned image.
You can configure manually in settings.
wiz_err_ai_msg:
Could not process the resume with AI.

Check your API Key in settings (⚙ → Bot → AI Settings)
and restart the bot.
wiz_done_footer:
Review and complete your data in settings (⚙ button).
Pay attention to the Responses and Search tabs.
job_terms_wiz_msg:
You have no search terms configured for LinkedIn.

Would you like me to analyze your resume with AI to automatically generate the best job titles?
